purpose: Hard-30 YouTube Shorts fragrance fixture for transcript-only rhetorical-tone viability work.

required_gates: transcript pointer under verified durable data root
creator distribution exactly 3 rows per selected creator
automatic_abstain_gates: unknown or unverified Shorts serving surface
scoreable_now: text-derived rhetorical tone labels justified from transcript words and phrasing
transcript-visible speaking posture categories with abstain allowed

storage_posture.scratch_status: prior C:\tmp packets are superseded for fixture admission by durable recapture/replacement pointers

accepted_residuals: This is a viability fixture, not a benchmark-grade labeled corpus.
Most rows use YouTube auto captions; downstream cleaning and label adjudication remain required.
One row uses ASR derived text because no caption track was available; it passed the word-count gate but remains model-generated.
Transcript-only tone cannot support energy/prosody claims.
No comments, visuals, or audio-feature measures are included in this fixture.
